greeting.title: Welcome to CueLight
greeting.subtitle: A local AI workspace for film and story production.

workflow.title: How do you prefer to work?
workflow.subtitle: Pick the workflow CueLight should optimize first. You can reopen onboarding later and switch.

cli.title: CLI Agents
cli.description: Browse the agent CLIs Panes already supports, install the ones you want, and then choose the workspace where you want to start.

chat.title: Chat with CueLight Agent
chat.description: Use CueLight Agent by default, or choose Codex, Claude, OpenCode, or any combination for advanced workflows. CueLight will verify readiness and then send you to a workspace.

cliProviders.title: Pick your CLI agents
cliProviders.subtitle: See which providers are already available on this machine and install any missing ones before opening your first workspace.
cliProviders.helper: Launch is intentionally skipped here. The onboarding ends after you confirm a workspace, then Panes takes you to the harness panel.

chatEngines.title: Pick your chat harnesses
chatEngines.subtitle: Choose which harnesses you want ready inside CueLight chat.
chatEngines.helper: CueLight Agent is the default Native engine. You can also select Codex, Claude, OpenCode, or any combination. The next step checks each selected runtime before you continue.

codex.description: Chat powered by the Codex App Server. May install Node.js and the Codex CLI if they are missing.

claude.description: Chat powered by the Claude Agent SDK. Does not require installing the Claude CLI separately.

cuelightAgent.description: CueLight-branded built-in Native Agent. Runs inside the app for film projects and local workspaces.

opencode.description: Chat powered by the OpenCode headless server. Requires the opencode CLI on PATH.

chatReadiness.title: Verify chat readiness
chatReadiness.subtitle: Panes is checking the selected engines, plus the dependencies they actually need for chat.
chatReadiness.helper: Warnings about future auth setup are informational in this version. The goal here is to get the runtime installed and a workspace selected.
chatReadiness.readyHint: Everything selected for chat is ready. Continue to choose the workspace you want to use first.
chatReadiness.authDeferred: Codex still needs account sign-in, but that does not block onboarding in this version. Finish onboarding now and complete Codex auth afterward.
chatReadiness.nodeInstallAvailable: Node.js is missing. Panes can install it automatically so the selected chat engines can run.
chatReadiness.nodeInstallManual: Node.js is missing. Install Node.js 20+ manually, then refresh the readiness check.
chatReadiness.codexInstallAvailable: Codex CLI is missing. Panes can install it automatically for the Codex chat engine.
chatReadiness.codexInstallManual: Codex CLI is missing. Install it manually, then refresh the readiness check.
chatReadiness.openCodeInstallAvailable: OpenCode CLI is missing. Panes can install it with npm for the OpenCode chat engine.
chatReadiness.openCodeInstallManual: OpenCode CLI is missing. Install Node.js/npm and OpenCode manually, then refresh the readiness check.

status.pending: Health data has not loaded yet.

workspace.title: Confirm your first workspace
workspace.subtitle: Choose the workspace Panes should open after onboarding. Even if one is already active, confirm it here explicitly.
workspace.helper: Select an existing workspace or open a new folder. Onboarding completes only after this confirmation.
workspace.empty: No workspaces are available yet. Open a folder to continue.
